arts.ttl: Jack Grealish told to follow Marcus Rashford example after Aston Villa revival
arts.sum: The former Aston Villa captain has struggled for game-time at Manchester City this season - and has been told to leave the Etihad Stadium Indeed Grealish’s brilliance in the Treble winning year of 2023 now seems something of a memory and just as Rashford has thrived after leaving Man Utd and joining Unai Emery at Aston Villa, so too Grealish has been told to find a new club.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star says he’s a few weeks away from fitness – Gives update on situation
arts.sum: Aston Villa star Amadou Onana has struggled with a hamstring injury on multiple occasions this season. In October, the Belgium international suffered a setback that kept him on the sidelines for over two weeks. He picked up another hamstring injury in January and returned to the pitch in Aston Villa’s 2-0 defeat to Wolverhampton Wanderers The post Aston Villa star says he’s a few weeks away from fitness – Gives update on situation appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Emi Martinez told the one trait he showed at Arsenal which led to Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea great and former Arsenal goalkeeper Petr Cech believes Emiliano Martinez possessed 'too much energy' during his years at the Emirates Stadium - and he had to leave for Aston Villa in order to become the world class stopper he has developed into. Cech, Chelsea's former technical and performance advisor who has moved into ice hockey since retiring from football, worked with Martinez when the pair were together at Arsenal, although the latter spent much of his time away from North London during loan spells with Reading, Wolves, Sheffield Wednesday and others.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge vs Aston Villa – Champions League match preview and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa face Club Brugge on Tuesday night in the first leg of their Uefa Champions League round of 16 tie. The two sides have already encountered each other in the competition this season. Brugge narrowly beat the Villans, who will be hoping for a different outcome tonight. arts.ttl: Every word John McGinn said about Rashford, truth behind Emery's comments and Club Brugge 'revenge'
arts.sum: Aston Villa captain John McGinn spoke with the press ahead of the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie against Club Brugge The game was tight here before, but Club Brugge deserved to win, so we need to be at our best to get a result.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Club Brugge – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa face Club Brugge in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie this evening. Unai Emery’s side qualified for this stage automatically and next face surprise package Brugge. The Belgian side eliminated Atalanta in the play-off round and beat Aston Villa 1-0 during the league phase. arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about injuries, managing emotions, Asensio's importance and Club Brugge
arts.sum: I know how competitive they are and how they are doing in the Champions League and when we analyse them we see them playing with confidence and playing strong and it’s a really good challenge to play against a team with experience in Europe and experienced players as well. "We are always trying to analyse and get information about each match we are playing with the players about the difficulties we’re facing.
